violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking from menu. Establishment must add allergy statement to menu. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, potatoes were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Potatoes were transferred to sheet pans at the time of inspection. Establishment is to review cooling methods with staff. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The following was observed in poor repair -Cold-water knob at the hand washing sink -Hand washing faucet (observed with tape) -Walk-in cooler handle (observed with tape) Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the kitchen dishwasher. Establishment is to obtain test strips. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with red residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Peanut soup, pumpkin soup, chicken soup and rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Empanadas was observed held at 118 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, soups and rice were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the prep unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
Chest freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer has brown and black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
The fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

The walls in the baking area are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
The wall in the wait staff area is in poor repair, observed exposed concrete. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
